subject: Audit TDD evidence and verification depth
description: Review the implementation specifically for TDD and verification sufficiency. Check whether each ticket has failing-test-first evidence or at minimum whether the delivered tests actually prove the acceptance criteria. Focus on missing regression cases, untested edge cases, and places where code exists but validator/test coverage is too weak for production readiness. Report only concrete findings with file:line refs.
result:
Reviewed TCAR implementation for TDD/verification sufficiency. Verdict: REQUEST CHANGES.

Findings:
1. Phase-0 bridge runner is still stubbed and unverified end-to-end: scripts/tli/run-phase0-bridge.ts:8,31-36 says DB integration is still pending and returns only pending_not_materialized defaults; tests cover validators only (scripts/tli/__tests__/phase0-bridge.test.ts:1-12, scripts/tli/__tests__/phase0-bridge-certification.test.ts:1-6).
2. Promotion-eligibility audit path is inconsistent and under-verified: scripts/tli/build-query-snapshots.ts:119-153 hard-codes inferred/imported rows as ineligible with reasons inferred_boundary/imported_boundary, while lib/tli/promotion-eligibility.ts:39-86 requires hasAuditPass and emits *_no_audit reasons; comparison-v4 promotion code/tests never consume that contract (scripts/tli/comparison-v4-promotion.ts:12-18,20-31; scripts/tli/__tests__/comparison-v4-promotion.test.ts:10-83).
3. Fail-closed/forecast-control coverage is unit-only, not serving-path verified: scripts/tli/forecast-serving.ts:4-5 is a pure no-DB helper with test-only references; actual serving still reads comparison_v4_control instead of forecast_control_v1 (app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.ts:145-149,291-315), and ticket target app/api/tli/themes/[id]/forecast-reader.ts is absent.
4. Analyst-facing payload/UI verification is incomplete: app/api/tli/themes/[id]/route.test.ts:53-80 covers only the error path, build-response.test.ts:5-66 only checks metadata passthrough, and theme-prediction tests cover only scenario labels/render gating (app/themes/[id]/_components/theme-prediction/presentation.test.ts:10-31) while the component itself has no low-evidence/abstention inputs (app/themes/[id]/_components/theme-prediction/index.tsx:34-45,64-79,176-179).
5. TCAR-020 rollout evidence is not reproducible from repo state: docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-tickets.md:552-569 requires runbook/certification docs, but docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-runbook.md and docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-certification.md are missing.

Residual risk:
- I did not find durable TCAR RED/GREEN execution evidence outside test comments; repo search over docs/TLI-WORK-LOG.md, .omx/scientist/reports, and output only surfaced the policy requirements, not ticket-level TCAR proof.

Verification:
PASS - npx tsc --noEmit
PASS - npm test -- [27 focused TCAR/app files] (27 files, 457 tests)
PASS - npm test -- app/api/tli/themes/[id]/route.test.ts app/api/tli/themes/[id]/fetch-theme-data-v4.test.ts (2 files, 8 tests)
PASS - npx eslint [reviewed TCAR/app files]
FAIL - npx eslint lib/tli scripts/tli ... (pre-existing errors in scripts/tli/backfill-state-history.ts:38, scripts/tli/level4/calibration-artifact.ts:42, scripts/tli/level4/weight-artifact.ts:27)
